title: DeathKick
description: a mod for fabric that kicks a player on death works on servers
body:
This mod for Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.10 implements a straightforward consequence for player mortality.

**Function:**

When a player dies, they are instantly kicked from the server. The player retains the ability to immediately rejoin the game.

The purpose of this mod is to force a momentary, mandatory exit and re-entry upon death, effectively resetting the player's session for a **hardcore-esque** feel.
**pls sub**
